data.title: Trade investigation launched by Trump admin to assess forced labor policies of multiple countries.
data.description: On Thursday, the Trump administration initiated a trade investigation to examine the anti-forced labor policies of numerous countries. The investigation will cover policies of dozens of countries regarding forced labor.

data.title: Aphranel Named to Forbes China Beauty 100 List
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Shanghai, Aphranel, a regenerative medical aesthetics brand from China owned by SHANGHAI MOYANG BIOTECHNOLOGY, was included in the prestigious Third Forbes China Beauty 100 list. This list, compiled by Forbes China, highlights top brands in the beauty industry in China. This recognition showcases Aphranel's success and prominence within the sector.

data.title: Mojtaba Khamenei To Be Removed Before 2026 Ends? Here's What Crypto Prediction Market Says About Iran's New Supreme Leader
data.description: Recently appointed as Iran's Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei is already a subject of speculation in the world of cryptocurrency betting. According to the prediction market Polymarket, which operates on the Polygon platform, there is a 64% chance that Khamenei will be removed, detained, or blocked from fulfilling his role before the end of the year, with a 38% likelihood of this occurring by April 30. The bets placed on this outcome amount to over $2 million. An official announcement of his resignation or removal would trigger a resolution on this bet. The story elaborates on similar bets made regarding his situation.

data.title: Sekisui Specialty Chemicals Announces Global Price Increase
data.description: Sekisui Specialty Chemicals has recently revealed their decision to raise the prices of Selvol® Polyvinyl Alcohol, Selvol Ultiloc®, Selvol Ultalux®, and Selvol Premiol® products. This price adjustment will affect the North American region, with an increase of $250 per metric ton. This change is scheduled to be implemented in response to market conditions and is aimed at ensuring the sustainability of their product line.

data.title: Trump to headline event for top memecoin holders in Florida as token hits record low, aiming to boost value.
data.description: The former president, Donald Trump, is scheduled to speak at a gathering in Florida for his most prominent memecoin investors. This news coincides with the memecoin reaching its lowest value ever.
